user.title: Connect to Hermes Agent
user.description: Enter the base URL and token for the machine or container running Hermes Agent's Home Assistant voice/WebSocket receiver. This is the Hermes endpoint that Home Assistant can reach; it is not your Home Assistant URL.

data_description.url: Base URL of the Hermes host/container, for example http://192.168.1.20:7860 or http://hermes.local:7860. The integration connects to the Hermes receiver under this URL.
data_description.token: Bearer token expected by Hermes Agent. Use HERMES_HA_WS_TOKEN if set; otherwise use the API_SERVER_KEY/HERMES_API_KEY token used by the Hermes API server. This is not a Home Assistant long-lived access token.

error.url_invalid: URL must start with http:// or https://
error.token_required: Hermes API / WebSocket token is required

data.entity_filter: Entity IDs to monitor (empty = all; one per line or comma-separated)

data.wake_word: Wake-word keyword(s) (one per line or comma-separated)
data.media_player_entity: Media player entity ID for TTS playback
